title: Australopyrum velutinum
taxonomy: Australopyrum velutinum is classified as a species within the genus Australopyrum, which belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is part of the order Poales and is native to Australia. intro: Australopyrum velutinum, also known as Australopyrum, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits. Australopyrum contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
